chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 978 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 15.05.2024 Mr. Riaz Ali Shaikh, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for petitioner has filed affidavit-in-rejoinder to the comments of respondent No.9, taken on record. We have heard learned Counsel for the petitioner. He submits that a dispute between him and private respondents over demarcation of land is going on as the private respondents are trying to occupy his land under the garb claim of ownership. His case is, however, rebutted by learned AAG Sindh stating that the petitioner wants to occupy forest land. In any case, petitioner’s Counsel submits that he would file a proper application for demarcation before the relevant forum, and relevant department may be directed to consider the same in accordance with law. Learned AAG Sindh undertakes that if an application is filed before the relevant forum for demarcation, the same would be considered and decided in accordance with law. Accordingly, the petition is disposed of in above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
